summary: Game Runtime Engine (Phase 2C) testing complete. All 6 features pass - play page load, title scene, question scene, answer selection, score tracking, and game completion all working correctly.

1_play_page_load.details: Navigate to /play/:gameId loads Play component correctly with data-testid='play-page' and fetches game data

2_title_scene.details: Game starts with title scene (data-testid='title-scene') showing game name 'Test Math Game', description, grade levels (Grade 4, 5), subject (Math), 2 questions, ~15 min duration, and Start Game button (data-testid='start-game-btn')

3_question_scene.details: After clicking Start, question scene (data-testid='question-scene') displays with question text, difficulty stars, 4 answer options (A-D), 30s countdown timer, progress bar, score badge, and 'Need a hint?' option

4_answer_selection.details: Clicking an answer option (data-testid='answer-option-{id}') processes answer and shows feedback scene (data-testid='feedback-scene') with Correct/Incorrect feedback, points earned, explanation, and Continue button (data-testid='continue-btn')

5_score_tracking.details: Correct answers increment score with base points + combo bonus + speed bonus. Combo counter increases with consecutive correct answers (tested 2x combo). Incorrect answers reset combo to 0. Score badge updates in real-time.

6_game_completion.details: After all questions, victory scene (data-testid='victory-scene') displays with 'Game Complete!' title, final score, accuracy percentage, best combo, confetti celebration (canvas-confetti), Play Again button, and Exit button (data-testid='exit-game-btn'). Exit redirects to dashboard.

seed_data_creation: Used existing test game from previous iterations. Game has 2 math questions: '5x6=30' and '7x8=56'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game Runtime Engine complete. GameRuntime.jsx handles quiz flow with scenes: TITLE -> QUESTION -> FEEDBACK -> VICTORY. Key data-testids: play-page, game-runtime, title-scene, start-game-btn, question-scene, answer-option-{id}, feedback-scene, continue-btn, victory-scene, exit-game-btn. Questions may shuffle based on game settings. canvas-confetti library used for celebrations.
game_flow_tested: Title scene displays with game info
Question scene shows next question (or victory if last)
Victory scene shows final stats with celebration
